chart_title: Declared concentration groups among enrolling students — Class of 2029
scope_note: Harvard's currently accessible official admissions statistics page publishes enrolling-student shares by broad concentration group, not a source-backed per-major registered-student breakdown. This panel now uses Harvard's official group shares instead of equal-weight placeholder bubbles.
notes: Method: values come from Harvard's Admissions Statistics page for the Class of 2029. Bubble size reflects the published percentage share for each broad concentration group among enrolling students. Harvard does not provide per-major registered-student counts on this cited page, so this is a group-level official override rather than a major-by-major census. The Special Concentration bubble uses 0.5% only as a visualization midpoint for Harvard's published '<1%' bucket label.
